# AniGO Design System Specification
## Go + Magic Spells | 9x9 Board | Premium Dark Fantasy

**Generated by Agent 10 (Game UX/UI Designer) using UI/UX Pro Max toolkit**
**Date: 2026-04-08**

---

## 1. CSS Custom Properties

```css
/* ============================================
   AniGO Design System — CSS Custom Properties
   ============================================ */

@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap');

:root {
  /* ── Background & Surface ── */
  --bg-deep:            #0a0a0f;
  --bg-base:            #0e0e14;
  --bg-elevated:        #141420;
  --bg-board:           #1a1510;
  --bg-board-inner:     #1e1913;
  --surface:            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04);
  --surface-hover:      rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.07);

  /* ── Board ── */
  --board-bg:           #1a1510;
  --board-grid:         rgba(180, 160, 130, 0.35);
  --board-grid-star:    rgba(180, 160, 130, 0.6);
  --board-highlight:    rgba(212, 160, 23, 0.15);

  /* ── Stones ── */
  --stone-black:        #0d0d12;
  --stone-black-shimmer: rgba(60, 80, 160, 0.25);
  --stone-black-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6);
  --stone-white:        #f0ead6;
  --stone-white-glow:   rgba(255, 248, 225, 0.4);
  --stone-white-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);

  /* ── Chi / Resource ── */
  --chi-gold:           #D4A017;
  --chi-gold-glow:      rgba(212, 160, 23, 0.3);
  --chi-gold-dim:       #8B6914;

  /* ── Spell Categories ── */
  --spell-offensive:    #DC2626;
  --spell-offensive-bg: rgba(220, 38, 38, 0.12);
  --spell-defensive:    #0D9488;
  --spell-defensive-bg: rgba(13, 148, 136, 0.12);
  --spell-info:         #8B5CF6;
  --spell-info-bg:      rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.12);
  --spell-terrain:      #059669;
  --spell-terrain-bg:   rgba(5, 150, 105, 0.12);
  --spell-trap:         #D97706;
  --spell-trap-bg:      rgba(217, 119, 6, 0.12);

  /* ── Weather Conditions ── */
  --weather-clear:      #F5F5DC;
  --weather-fog:        #6B7280;
  --weather-storm:      #5E6AD2;
  --weather-fire:       #EF4444;
  --weather-ice:        #67E8F9;
  --weather-void:       #A855F7;

  /* ── Text ── */
  --foreground:         #EDEDEF;
  --foreground-muted:   #8A8F98;
  --foreground-dim:     #555860;
  --foreground-gold:    #D4A017;

  /* ── Borders & Glass ── */
  --border:             rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
  --border-accent:      rgba(212, 160, 23, 0.25);
  --glass-bg:           rgba(14, 14, 20, 0.75);
  --glass-border:       rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
  --glass-blur:         20px;

  /* ── UI Chrome ── */
  --destructive:        #DC2626;
  --success:            #059669;
  --warning:            #D97706;
  --ring:               rgba(212, 160, 23, 0.5);

  /* ── Typography ── */
  --font-heading:       'Cormorant', Georgia, serif;
  --font-body:          'Inter', -apple-system, sans-serif;
  --font-mono:          'JetBrains Mono', 'SF Mono', monospace;

  /* ── Sizing ── */
  --radius-sm:          6px;
  --radius-md:          12px;
  --radius-lg:          16px;
  --radius-card:        10px;
  --radius-stone:       50%;

  /* ── Spacing ── */
  --header-h:           56px;
  --left-panel-w:       160px;
  --bottom-bar-h:       48px;
  --card-w:             120px;
  --card-h:             160px;

  /* ── Animation ── */
  --ease-out:           cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);
  --duration-fast:      150ms;
  --duration-normal:    250ms;
  --duration-slow:      400ms;
  --spring-damping:     20;
  --spring-stiffness:   90;
}
```

---

## 2. Typography

| Role     | Font             | Weight       | Size Range     |
|----------|------------------|--------------|----------------|
| Heading  | Cormorant        | 500-700      | 20-36px        |
| Body     | Inter            | 300-600      | 13-16px        |
| Mono     | JetBrains Mono   | 400-600      | 12-18px        |
| Spell Names | Cormorant     | 600          | 14px           |
| Chi/Score | JetBrains Mono  | 600          | 16-24px        |
| HUD Labels | Inter          | 500          | 11-13px        |

**Google Fonts Import:**
```
https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap
```

**Rationale:** Cormorant provides mystical/elegant character for headings and spell names (Eastern calligraphy feel without being gimmicky). Inter for clean, highly readable UI. JetBrains Mono for precise numeric displays (Chi, scores, timers).

---

## 3. Layout

```
+---------------------------------------------------------------+
| HEADER (56px)                                                 |
| [AniGO Logo] | Turn/Phase Indicator | Chi: 7 | [Menu ...]   |
+----------+--------------------------------------------+-------+
|          |                                            |       |
| LEFT     |          CENTER                            |       |
| PANEL    |          9x9 Board Canvas                  |       |
| (160px)  |          (flexible, 1:1 aspect)            |       |
|          |                                            |       |
| Spell    |    *   *   *                               |       |
| Hand     |                                            |       |
| (cards)  |    *   *   *                               |       |
|          |                                            |       |
| Deck: 2  |    *   *   *                               |       |
| Opp Info |          (star = hoshi points)              |       |
|          |                                            |       |
+----------+--------------------------------------------+-------+
| BOTTOM BAR (48px): Game log / Action hints / Phase label      |
+---------------------------------------------------------------+
```

| Zone         | Size         | Notes                                     |
|--------------|--------------|-------------------------------------------|
| Header       | h: 56px      | Fixed top, glass-bg, z-index 100          |
| Left Panel   | w: 160px     | Fixed left, glass-bg, scrollable cards    |
| Center Board | flex, 1:1    | Canvas element, min 360px, max 600px      |
| Bottom Bar   | h: 48px      | Fixed bottom, glass-bg, scrolling log     |

---

## 4. Key Component Specs

### 4.1 Board (9x9 Grid)

- **Container:** Square aspect ratio, `background: var(--board-bg)`
- **Grid lines:** 1px solid `var(--board-grid)`, 8 lines horizontal + 8 vertical (edges of playable area)
- **Star points (hoshi):** 6px diameter circles at positions (3,3), (3,7), (5,5), (7,3), (7,7) using `var(--board-grid-star)`
- **Cell size:** `boardSize / 9` (responsive)
- **Hover indicator:** Subtle `var(--board-highlight)` circle on valid intersections
- **Territory shading:** 8% opacity fill of controlling player's stone color
- **Last-move marker:** 4px ring of `var(--chi-gold)` around last placed stone

### 4.2 Stones

```css
.stone {
  width: 90%;           /* of cell size */
  height: 90%;
  border-radius: 50%;
  position: absolute;
  transition: transform var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-out);
}
.stone--black {
  background: radial-gradient(circle at 35% 35%,
    #2a2a35 0%, var(--stone-black) 70%);
  box-shadow:
    inset 0 -2px 4px var(--stone-black-shimmer),
    0 2px 8px var(--stone-black-shadow);
}
.stone--white {
  background: radial-gradient(circle at 35% 35%,
    #fffff0 0%, var(--stone-white) 70%);
  box-shadow:
    inset 0 -2px 4px rgba(200, 190, 160, 0.3),
    0 1px 6px var(--stone-white-shadow),
    0 0 12px var(--stone-white-glow);
}
.stone--enchanted::after {
  /* subtle pulsing glow ring for enchanted stones */
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  inset: -3px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  border: 1px solid var(--chi-gold);
  opacity: 0.5;
  animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}
```

### 4.3 Spell Cards

```
+------------------+     120 x 160px
| [Category Color  |     border-left: 3px solid var(--spell-{category})
|  Border Left]    |     background: var(--glass-bg)
|                  |     backdrop-filter: blur(var(--glass-blur))
|    [Icon 32px]   |     border: 1px solid var(--glass-border)
|                  |     border-radius: var(--radius-card)
|   Spell Name     |     font: Cormorant 600 14px
|   (Cormorant)    |
|                  |
| Chi Cost: 3      |     font: JetBrains Mono 600 14px, color: var(--chi-gold)
+------------------+
```

- **Hover:** Scale 1.05, border opacity increases, subtle glow of category color
- **Selected:** Gold ring, scale 1.08, category-color glow intensifies
- **Disabled (insufficient Chi):** opacity 0.4, grayscale filter
- **In-hand stack:** Vertical stack with 40px overlap, topmost card fully visible

### 4.4 HUD Elements

| Element           | Spec                                                    |
|-------------------|---------------------------------------------------------|
| Chi Display       | Hex icon (SVG, 20px) filled `var(--chi-gold)` + JetBrains Mono 600 18px |
| Turn Indicator    | "YOUR TURN" / "OPPONENT" pill, Inter 500 12px uppercase, 4px letter-spacing |
| Phase Label       | "PLACE STONE" / "CAST SPELL" / "PASS", Inter 400 13px  |
| Capture Count     | Stone icon (12px) + count, JetBrains Mono 500 14px      |
| Timer             | JetBrains Mono 600 16px, turns `var(--destructive)` under 10s |
| Deck Counter      | "Deck: N" Inter 400 12px, muted color                   |

### 4.5 Draft Screen (Pre-Game)

```
+---------------------------------------------------+
| DRAFT YOUR SPELLS               Chi Budget: 12    |
|                                                    |
| [Card] [Card] [Card] [Card] [Card] [Card]         |
|  160x  (6 large cards, 160x220px in draft mode)   |
|  220px                                             |
|                                                    |
| Selected: [mini] [mini] [mini] [mini]  (pick 4)   |
|                                                    |
|        [ CONFIRM DRAFT ]  (gold CTA button)        |
+---------------------------------------------------+
```

- **Draft cards:** 160x220px (larger than in-game), full description visible
- **Selection:** Click to toggle, gold border + checkmark when selected
- **Confirm button:** `background: var(--chi-gold)`, `color: #0a0a0f`, Inter 600 14px, `border-radius: var(--radius-md)`, disabled until 4 selected
- **Max 4 indicator:** "2/4 Selected" with progress dots

---

## 5. Glassmorphism Panel Spec

```css
.glass-panel {
  background: var(--glass-bg);        /* rgba(14,14,20,0.75) */
  backdrop-filter: blur(var(--glass-blur));  /* 20px */
  border: 1px solid var(--glass-border);     /* rgba(255,255,255,0.06) */
  border-radius: var(--radius-lg);           /* 16px */
}
```

Applied to: Header, Left Panel, Bottom Bar, Spell Cards, Modals.

---

## 6. Spell Category Color Reference

| Category    | Color Variable         | Hex       | Use                        |
|-------------|------------------------|-----------|----------------------------|
| Offensive   | `--spell-offensive`    | `#DC2626` | Damage, capture, destroy   |
| Defensive   | `--spell-defensive`    | `#0D9488` | Protect, shield, reinforce |
| Information | `--spell-info`         | `#8B5CF6` | Reveal, scout, predict     |
| Terrain     | `--spell-terrain`      | `#059669` | Modify board, create walls |
| Trap        | `--spell-trap`         | `#D97706` | Hidden triggers, delays    |

---

## 7. Weather Visual Effects

| Weather | Color              | Visual Treatment                              |
|---------|--------------------|-----------------------------------------------|
| Clear   | `#F5F5DC` (beige)  | Default, no overlay                           |
| Fog     | `#6B7280` (gray)   | 15% opacity overlay, reduced visibility radius|
| Storm   | `#5E6AD2` (indigo) | Animated lightning flickers, dark overlay      |
| Fire    | `#EF4444` (red)    | Ember particles, warm color shift on board    |
| Ice     | `#67E8F9` (cyan)   | Frost edge vignette, slight blue tint         |
| Void    | `#A855F7` (purple) | Distortion shader, dark purple vignette       |

---

## 8. Animation Standards

| Action           | Duration    | Easing                              |
|------------------|-------------|-------------------------------------|
| Stone placement  | 150ms       | `var(--ease-out)`                   |
| Stone capture    | 300ms       | `var(--ease-out)` + fade out        |
| Spell cast       | 400ms       | Spring (damping 20, stiffness 90)   |
| Card hover       | 150ms       | `var(--ease-out)`                   |
| Card select      | 250ms       | Spring                              |
| Panel transition | 250ms       | `var(--ease-out)`                   |
| Weather change   | 800ms       | Linear crossfade                    |

---

## 9. Accessibility Notes

- All text meets WCAG AA 4.5:1 contrast against `--bg-deep`
- Stones distinguishable by shape marker (dot/ring) for colorblind mode
- `prefers-reduced-motion`: disable stone animations, weather particles, ambient blobs
- Keyboard: Tab through board intersections, Enter to place, Escape to cancel
- Spell cards: aria-label with full description, category, and Chi cost
- Focus ring: 2px solid `var(--ring)` on all interactive elements

---

## 10. Responsive Breakpoints

| Breakpoint | Board Size | Left Panel | Layout Change                  |
|------------|------------|------------|--------------------------------|
| >= 1200px  | 540px      | 160px      | Full layout as spec            |
| 768-1199px | 420px      | 140px      | Compressed card stack          |
| < 768px    | 100vw-32px | Bottom     | Panel moves below board, tabs  |
